category_sources: Official GitHub README describes croc as a tool for simple and secure file and folder transfer between computers.
source_facts.description says croc securely sends things from one computer to another.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use the project name croc.
docs_sources: No separate official docs site was identified; the official README is the best documentation surface.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes secure transfer of files and folders.
source_facts.description identifies secure transfer between computers.
